title: Academic KPI Dashboard (Power BI)
description: Built an interactive Power BI dashboard on top of SQL Server and Canvas Data to track enrollment, course completion, and engagement KPIs for university leadership. Replaced manual weekly reports with a live, drill-down dashboard.

title: Automated Institutional Reporting via REST APIs
description: Automated recurring institutional reports by pulling data from Canvas Data and REST APIs into SQL Server, cutting manual reporting effort significantly and improving data freshness for stakeholders.

title: Learner Engagement Analysis
description: Analyzed digital learning platform data to identify drop-off points in learner engagement, using SQL for extraction and Excel for pivot-based trend analysis, resulting in process recommendations for operations teams.

title: E-commerce Sales & Customer Segmentation Dashboard
description: Sample project: Built a Tableau dashboard analyzing online store sales, customer segments (RFM analysis), and product performance to highlight growth opportunities and underperforming SKUs.

title: IT Helpdesk Ticket Analysis
description: Sample project: Analyzed IT support ticket data in Python (pandas) to find resolution-time bottlenecks by category and priority, then visualized findings in Power BI for the support team lead.

title: Retail Inventory & Demand Trends
description: Sample project: Used Excel and SQL to model reorder points and identify slow-moving inventory across store locations, reducing stockout risk on top sellers.

title: Personal Finance Tracker & Budget Insights
description: Sample project: Built a simple Excel-based personal finance tracker with pivot tables and charts to visualize monthly spending patterns by category.

title: Healthcare Patient No-Show Prediction (Exploratory)
description: Sample project: Exploratory Python analysis (pandas, matplotlib) on appointment data to surface factors correlated with patient no-shows, laying groundwork for a predictive model.
